subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up and for your interest in exploring a potential partnership.

I’d be happy to arrange a 30-minute call. Here are some time windows that could work on our side (all times 14:00–16:00, local time):
- Tuesday, 21 April 2026
- Wednesday, 22 April 2026
- Thursday, 23 April 2026

Please let me know which of these options works best for you, or feel free to propose an alternative time if needed.

Regarding internal contact details, we’re not able to share direct phone numbers or internal directory information. Once we’ve aligned on next steps, we’ll make sure the appropriate stakeholders are included through our usual internal process.

Best regards,
Agent
